recommendations.title: Enron: The Smartest Guys in the Room
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the Enron corporation, its faulty and corrupt business practices, and how they led to its fall.

recommendations.title: Super Size Me 2: Holy Chicken!
recommendations.overview: Muckraking filmmaker Morgan Spurlock reignites his battle with the food industry — this time from behind the register — as he opens his own fast food restaurant.

recommendations.title: Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief
recommendations.overview: GOING CLEAR intimately profiles eight former members of the Church of Scientology, shining a light on how they attract true believers and the things they do in the name of religion.

recommendations.title: POM Wonderful Presents: The Greatest Movie Ever Sold
recommendations.overview: A documentary about branding, advertising and product placement that is financed and made possible by brands, advertising and product placement.

recommendations.title: One Direction: This Is Us
recommendations.overview: "One Direction: This Is Us" is a captivating and intimate all-access look at life on the road for the global music phenomenon. Weaved with stunning live concert footage, this inspiring feature film tells the remarkable story of Niall, Zayn, Liam, Har

recommendations.title: Super Size Me
recommendations.overview: Morgan Spurlock subjects himself to a diet based only on McDonald's fast food three times a day for thirty days without exercising to try to prove why so many Americans are fat or obese. He submits himself to a complete check-up by three doctors, com

recommendations.title: Taxi to the Dark Side
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the torture practices of the United States in Afghanistan, Iraq and Guantanamo Bay, focusing on an innocent taxi driver in Afghanistan who was tortured and killed in 2002.

recommendations.title: Back in Action
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after vanishing from the CIA to start a family, elite spies Matt and Emily jump back into the world of espionage when their cover is blown.

recommendations.title: The Inventor: Out for Blood in Silicon Valley
recommendations.overview: With a magical new invention that promised to revolutionize blood testing, Elizabeth Holmes became the world’s youngest self-made billionaire, heralded as the next Steve Jobs. Then, overnight, her 10-billion-dollar company dissolved. The rise and fal

recommendations.title: Zero Days
